top_signals.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Corning strikes another multibillion-dollar AI deal. What the new Amazon pact means for the stock
top_signals.summary: Amazon joins the laundry list of partnerships Corning has secured in 2026, which includes Meta Platforms and Nvidia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New Shai-Hulud attack trojanizes 19 science-focused PyPI packages
top_signals.summary: Hackers compromised 19 packages on the PyPI, collectively downloaded hundreds of thousands of times, in a new Shai-Hulud supply-chain attack that delivered malware designed to steal developer secrets. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Cup nears kickoff after pre-tournament turbulence
top_signals.summary: The 2026 World Cup gets underway on Thursday, with FIFA hoping soccer can rise above anger over prices, political tensions and the shadow of war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
